family_context.preferred_cover_geography: Georgia and Germany, ideally worldwide excluding the US

method_notes: This ledger is discovery-only and classifies how each candidate is initially reached from public evidence already staged in the repository.
direct_to_consumer_official_quote_or_application means an insurer-owned public page and an insurer-owned quote/application/signup URL were both captured on the same registrable domain family.

official_marketing_page_to_external_or_specialized_quote_flow means an official page exists but the captured quote/application flow lives on a different domain family or specialist portal, so the retail handoff is plausible but not fully verified as same-brand self-serve.
broker_or_intermediary_led means the staged evidence is broker-sourced, so no direct-to-consumer insurer path was verified in this run.
official_information_page_without_public_quote_path_verified means discovery found an official public page but did not capture a distinct quote/application URL.
legacy_brand_redirect_to_other_insurer is reserved for candidates whose public page explicitly routes new business to another insurer or platform.
Uncertainty is preserved instead of inferring hidden agent, broker, or underwriting steps from incomplete public pages.
